Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst

Class GenericSortCondition

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.GenericSortCondition
public abstract class GenericSortCondition extends Object
Abstract superclass for conditions controlling the instantiations of generic sorts

    Method

    abstract boolean
    check(Sort s, GenericSortInstantiations insts)
    returns true if the given sort s satisfies this generic sort condition

    Create the condition that needs to be fulfilled for the given instantiation of a metavariable to be correct, i.e.
    static GenericSortCondition

  • Constructor Details

    • GenericSortCondition

      protected GenericSortCondition(GenericSort p_gs)

  • Method Details

    • createCondition

      public static GenericSortCondition createCondition(SchemaVariable sv, InstantiationEntry<?> p_entry)
      Create the condition that needs to be fulfilled for the given instantiation of a metavariable to be correct, i.e. if the schemavariable is of generic sort, the instantiation of that sort has to match the sort of the schemavariable's instantiation
      Returns:
      the resulting condition, if the schemavariable is of generic sort; null, if the sorts are either always compatible (no generic sorts) or never compatible (non generic sorts that don't match)

    • createCondition

      public static GenericSortCondition createCondition(SortDependingFunction p0, SortDependingFunction p1)
      Create a condition ensuring that the two given symbols become identical; "p0" may be of generic sort, "p1" not
      Returns:
      the resulting condition; null if the symbols are either incompatible or equal

    • createCondition

      protected static GenericSortCondition createCondition(Sort s0, Sort s1, boolean p_identity)
      Create the condition to make a generic sort (s0) (or a collection sort of a generic sort) and a concrete sort (s1) equal
      Parameters:
      p_identity - true iff an identity condition should be generated (otherwise: a supersort condition is generated)
      Returns:
      the resulting condition, if "s0" is of generic sort; null, if the sorts are either always compatible (no generic sorts) or never compatible (e.g. non generic sorts that don't match)

    • forceInstantiation

      public static GenericSortCondition forceInstantiation(Sort p_s, boolean p_maximum)
      Create the condition to force the instantiation of a given (possibly generic) sort
      Parameters:
      p_maximum - hint whether the generic sort should be instantiated with the maximum or mimimum possible concrete sort (this hint is currently not used by GenericSortInstantiations)
      Returns:
      the resulting condition, or null if "p_s" is not generic

    • createSupersortCondition

      public static GenericSortCondition createSupersortCondition(GenericSort p_gs, Sort p_s)
      Returns:
      a condition that specifies the given generic sort to be instantiated with a supersort of the given concrete sort

    • createIdentityCondition

      public static GenericSortCondition createIdentityCondition(GenericSort p_gs, Sort p_s)
      Returns:
      a condition that specifies the given generic sort to be instantiated (exactly) with the given concrete sort

    • createForceInstantiationCondition

      public static GenericSortCondition createForceInstantiationCondition(GenericSort p_gs, boolean p_maximum)
      Parameters:
      p_maximum - hint whether the generic sort should be instantiated with the maximum or mimimum possible concrete sort (this hint is currently not used by GenericSortInstantiations)
      Returns:
      a condition that specifies the given generic sort to be instantiated

    • getGenericSort

      public GenericSort getGenericSort()

    • check

      public abstract boolean check(Sort s, GenericSortInstantiations insts)
      returns true if the given sort s satisfies this generic sort condition
      Parameters:
      s - the Sort to check
      insts - a map containing already found instantiations
      Returns:
      true if the given sort s satisfies this generic sort condition
